uncovered_waiver.reason: OMN-14826 hand-flips node_pr_state_projection_compute to canonical def-B via the OMN-14781 path (mirrors OMN-14821 for the sibling node_build_loop_projection_compute): the entrypoint param is retyped object->ModelEventMessage and the dead legacy execute()/_safe_correlation_id ProtocolHandler path is removed, while the projection business logic (project/_extract_payload/_require_str/_require_int/_first_str/_extract_timestamp/_extract_correlation_id/_coerce_event_message) is preserved byte-identical base_ref<->HEAD and re-derived from git by the ratchet. Equivalence is proven by that git-verbatim preservation plus the green runtime-dispatch parity tests over the selected corpus, not by a broad branch-coverage claim; the JSON-decode/non-object/missing-identity error branches are covered by the existing patched unit suite (test_project_raises_*) and are not re-driven through the deterministic SUCCESS-only dispatch corpus.
